## Model Details

**Model Name:**
<!-- e.g., Mistral Large 2, Cohere Command R+ -->

**Provider:**
<!-- OpenRouter / Anthropic / Direct API -->

**OpenRouter ID (if applicable):**
<!-- e.g., mistralai/mistral-large, cohere/command-r-plus -->

**Cost Tier:**
<!-- Free / Cheap / Paid — estimate cost per 1K tokens if known -->

## Why Should This Be Added?
<!-- What use case does this model serve? What tasks is it good at? -->

## Strengths
<!-- Which task categories should this model be preferred for? -->
- [ ] code_generation
- [ ] code_review
- [ ] debugging
- [ ] explanation
- [ ] architecture
- [ ] autocomplete
- [ ] security_audit

## Context Window
<!-- Model's context window size in tokens -->

## Speed
<!-- fast / medium / slow -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Benchmark scores, comparisons to existing models, etc. -->
